benefits.description: Lost 15 lbs first month (water + fat), then steady 10 lbs per month until reaching 190 lbs, then slowed

protocol_notes: Starting weight 260 lbs (BMI 38). Titrated: 5mg → 7.5mg → 10mg → 12.5mg each after only 1 month intervals. Now stalled at 165 lbs (BMI 22-23). Regrets moving up doses too quickly as may have contributed to earlier plateau. Advises staying on dose until weight loss stops before increasing. Has been on medication for extended period. Currently maintains lower BMI with medium-to-small frame. Concerned about GLP-1 resistance from aggressive titration.
